name: ieee-skills
description: Bilingual (Chinese-English) skills for writing IEEE communications-journal papers (JSAC, TWC, TC/TCOM, WCL, CL) — literature search and DOI/BibTeX verification, target-journal routing, manuscript drafting, reproducible methods, language polishing, IEEE citation and IEEEtran formatting, simulation and empirical evidence design, publication figures, IEEEtran compile/debug, submission cover letters, reviewer responses, and WCL/CL letters.

plugins.name: ieee-skills
plugins.description: A collection of Claude skills for producing IEEE communications-journal manuscripts (JSAC, TWC, TC/TCOM, WCL, CL). Covers literature search with DOI/BibTeX verification and related-work matrices, target-journal routing, section drafting and argument restructuring (system model incl. emerging paradigms RIS/NOMA/ISAC/near-field/cell-free, problem formulation, proposed algorithm or learning-based network, performance analysis with theorems/proofs), reproducible methods (notation, parameter tables, algorithm boxes, complexity), sentence-level polishing to IEEE style, numbered citation and IEEEtran formatting, simulation design with benchmark schemes, Monte-Carlo validation, empirical/ray-tracing/testbed evidence, learning-based and ISAC dual-metric evaluation, publication-grade result figures (BER-vs-SNR, convergence, NMSE, rate–CRB tradeoff), IEEEtran compile/debug, submission cover letters, point-by-point reviewer responses, and WCL/CL letters. Bilingual: converts Chinese author notes into submission-ready English.
